author: Awhile
text: STALE re doctor + operating — rescope. (1) The premise 'align prime.post with the §16 doctor hook's cwd store-dir source / match fn doctor()' is dead: fn doctor() is being DELETED (bl-77a7 burned §16 from the spec; bl-a38e removes the code). Don't reference fn doctor() or bl-0ec3 as the exemplar. (2) 'operating' is already RETIRED by bl-f970 (two-branch substrate: landing + tasks_branch store). The GOAL still stands on its own — prime.post should locate the store from cwd, not a deleted binding field — but restate it against the current store/landing model, citing neither operating/ nor fn doctor().
